verdict_reasoning: LYN is a non-receptor tyrosine kinase anchored to the inner leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation. Although it associates with the PM via its own lipidation mechanism, this association is on the cytoplasmic face, not accessible to extracellular binders. The protein operates as a cytoplasmic signaling enzyme positioned at the inner membrane interface. Context-dependent trafficking between cytosol and endomembranes occurs, but does not expose the protein body to the extracellular face.
